mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activity ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity (title, description, category, source, start_time, end_time, participate_way, link, is_student_exclusive, school_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{category}, #{source}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{participateWay}, #{link}, #{isStudentExclusive}, #{schoolId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE activity SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, category = #{category}, source = #{source}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, participate_way = #{participateWay}, link = #{link}, is_student_exclusive = #{isStudentExclusive}, school_id = #{schoolId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activity WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM activity WHERE source = #{source} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM activity WHERE school_id = #{schoolId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM activity WHERE is_student_exclusive = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
